Our country is struggling with a shortage of labour while the growth of labour productivity — the added value per hour worked — is slowing. The introduction of 5G can help lift productivity further.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Kasper Buiting. The Netherlands faces an economic challenge. Our country is struggling with a shortage of labour while the growth of labour productivity — the added value per hour worked — is slowing. The introduction of 5G can help lift productivity further. Companies will be able to let more devices communicate with each other faster and process large amounts of data.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: The Netherlands faces an economic challenge. Our country is struggling with a shortage of labour while the growth of labour productivity — the added value per hour worked — is slowing. The introduction of 5G can help lift productivity further. Companies will be able to let more devices communicate with each other faster and process large amounts of data. This offers opportunities in industry, transport and agriculture to scale up existing experiments.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Our country is struggling with a shortage of labour while the growth of labour productivity — the added value per hour worked — is slowing. The introduction of 5G can help lift productivity further. Companies will be able to let more devices communicate with each other faster and process large amounts of data. This offers opportunities in industry, transport and agriculture to scale up existing experiments. It is important to prepare now for the arrival of 5G.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: The introduction of 5G can help lift productivity further. Companies will be able to let more devices communicate with each other faster and process large amounts of data. This offers opportunities in industry, transport and agriculture to scale up existing experiments. It is important to prepare now for the arrival of 5G. Staff shortages are a daily reality.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Companies will be able to let more devices communicate with each other faster and process large amounts of data. This offers opportunities in industry, transport and agriculture to scale up existing experiments. It is important to prepare now for the arrival of 5G. Staff shortages are a daily reality. Raising productivity matters because the other source of economic growth — increasing the number of hours worked — is difficult at present.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: This offers opportunities in industry, transport and agriculture to scale up existing experiments. It is important to prepare now for the arrival of 5G. Staff shortages are a daily reality. Raising productivity matters because the other source of economic growth — increasing the number of hours worked — is difficult at present. Security guards, cleaners, industrial workers, IT professionals, drivers, nurses and many other types of workers are hard to find.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: It is important to prepare now for the arrival of 5G. Staff shortages are a daily reality. Raising productivity matters because the other source of economic growth — increasing the number of hours worked — is difficult at present. Security guards, cleaners, industrial workers, IT professionals, drivers, nurses and many other types of workers are hard to find. In five years, the share of companies that experience staff shortages as an obstacle has risen from five to 25 per cent.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Staff shortages are a daily reality. Raising productivity matters because the other source of economic growth — increasing the number of hours worked — is difficult at present. Security guards, cleaners, industrial workers, IT professionals, drivers, nurses and many other types of workers are hard to find. In five years, the share of companies that experience staff shortages as an obstacle has risen from five to 25 per cent. Shortages are exacerbated by mismatches between the supply and demand for education and experience, and because people cannot or do not always want to travel to where the work is.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Raising productivity matters because the other source of economic growth — increasing the number of hours worked — is difficult at present. Security guards, cleaners, industrial workers, IT professionals, drivers, nurses and many other types of workers are hard to find. In five years, the share of companies that experience staff shortages as an obstacle has risen from five to 25 per cent. Shortages are exacerbated by mismatches between the supply and demand for education and experience, and because people cannot or do not always want to travel to where the work is. Staff scarcity therefore seems set to remain for now.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Staff scarcity therefore seems set to remain for now. Economic growth in recent years largely rested on an increase in hours worked. Hospitality businesses benefited as consumers ate, drank and stayed overnight out of home more often, and they met that demand by hiring staff at a similar pace.

text: Economic growth in recent years largely rested on an increase in hours worked. This is feasible as long as there is sufficient labour supply. Hospitality made an impression by growing by almost four per cent per year on average from 2014 through 2018. Hospitality businesses benefited as consumers ate, drank and stayed overnight out of home more often, and they met that demand by hiring staff at a similar pace. The number of hours worked rose almost as fast each year as the sector’s added value.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: This is feasible as long as there is sufficient labour supply. Hospitality made an impression by growing by almost four per cent per year on average from 2014 through 2018. Hospitality businesses benefited as consumers ate, drank and stayed overnight out of home more often, and they met that demand by hiring staff at a similar pace. The number of hours worked rose almost as fast each year as the sector’s added value. When new employees are no longer available, however, the party is over for many hospitality businesses.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Hospitality made an impression by growing by almost four per cent per year on average from 2014 through 2018. Hospitality businesses benefited as consumers ate, drank and stayed overnight out of home more often, and they met that demand by hiring staff at a similar pace. The number of hours worked rose almost as fast each year as the sector’s added value. When new employees are no longer available, however, the party is over for many hospitality businesses. To keep meeting growing demand, firms must now focus more on raising productivity.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Hospitality businesses benefited as consumers ate, drank and stayed overnight out of home more often, and they met that demand by hiring staff at a similar pace. The number of hours worked rose almost as fast each year as the sector’s added value. When new employees are no longer available, however, the party is over for many hospitality businesses. To keep meeting growing demand, firms must now focus more on raising productivity. In other words: deliver more value with the same number of employees.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: To keep meeting growing demand, firms must now focus more on raising productivity. In other words: deliver more value with the same number of employees. metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: In other words: deliver more value with the same number of employees. Unfortunately, growth in labour productivity in the Netherlands slowed sharply in the past decade. In the coming decades it will be even harder to increase productivity because the average employee is ageing. That means fewer workers can raise their productivity relatively quickly through training and education. Scientific research shows that this way of raising productivity pays [dividends](https://www.cbs.nl/nl-nl/nieuws/2019/51/lagere-productiviteit-hangt-samen-met-groei-zelfstandigen) mainly for young employees.

text: Scientific research shows that this way of raising productivity pays [dividends](https://www.cbs.nl/nl-nl/nieuws/2019/51/lagere-productiviteit-hangt-samen-met-groei-zelfstandigen) mainly for young employees. Use of capital goods. Higher productivity will therefore have to come mainly from deploying capital goods such as machinery, software and robots. metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: In the past, companies already made great strides here, which made them highly competitive exporters on the global market. This ranges from the use of harvesting machines and milking robots in agriculture to automation in factories. Labour productivity is therefore also crucial for competitiveness. Companies are currently struggling to take further steps to keep growth up to par. metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Labour productivity is therefore also crucial for competitiveness. Companies are currently struggling to take further steps to keep growth up to par. Figures from Statistics Netherlands (CBS) show that in 2018 only one in a hundred companies invested in labour-substituting automation. The bar is rising to ratchet up productivity further. Publications on faltering labour productivity growth refer to the famous economist Robert Gordon, who argues that innovations further back in time created a more fundamental lead.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Companies are currently struggling to take further steps to keep growth up to par. Figures from Statistics Netherlands (CBS) show that in 2018 only one in a hundred companies invested in labour-substituting automation. The bar is rising to ratchet up productivity further. Publications on faltering labour productivity growth refer to the famous economist Robert Gordon, who argues that innovations further back in time created a more fundamental lead. Examples include the invention of the steam engine and electricity, and later the telephone and the car.

text: Examples include the invention of the steam engine and electricity, and later the telephone and the car. Major business potential thanks to 5G. metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Major business potential thanks to 5G. Even so, there are many ways to prevent a standstill in labour productivity growth. Many of these applications are now in an experimental phase. The new generation of mobile networks, 5G, makes it possible to take these applications to the next stage, provided it is used well. With its major business potential, 5G differs from its predecessors, which mainly made consumers’ lives easier.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Even so, there are many ways to prevent a standstill in labour productivity growth. Many of these applications are now in an experimental phase. The new generation of mobile networks, 5G, makes it possible to take these applications to the next stage, provided it is used well. With its major business potential, 5G differs from its predecessors, which mainly made consumers’ lives easier. metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: The new generation of mobile networks, 5G, makes it possible to take these applications to the next stage, provided it is used well. With its major business potential, 5G differs from its predecessors, which mainly made consumers’ lives easier. With 4G, consumers already enjoy many conveniences, especially in the Netherlands, where coverage is relatively good. Watching a TV series on a mobile phone is no longer exceptional. Although heavy data users among consumers would certainly like an even faster subscription, 5G mainly offers opportunities for the business market.

text: With its major business potential, 5G differs from its predecessors, which mainly made consumers’ lives easier. Although heavy data users among consumers would certainly like an even faster subscription, 5G mainly offers opportunities for the business market. This concerns the development of technologies that must process large volumes of data.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: With 4G, consumers already enjoy many conveniences, especially in the Netherlands, where coverage is relatively good. Watching a TV series on a mobile phone is no longer exceptional. Although heavy data users among consumers would certainly like an even faster subscription, 5G mainly offers opportunities for the business market. This concerns the development of technologies that must process large volumes of data. Thanks to 5G, much more data can be processed with higher up- and download speeds.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Watching a TV series on a mobile phone is no longer exceptional. Although heavy data users among consumers would certainly like an even faster subscription, 5G mainly offers opportunities for the business market. This concerns the development of technologies that must process large volumes of data. Thanks to 5G, much more data can be processed with higher up- and download speeds. In addition, far more devices than now can exchange information simultaneously via the mobile internet, which supports internet-of-things applications.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Although heavy data users among consumers would certainly like an even faster subscription, 5G mainly offers opportunities for the business market. This concerns the development of technologies that must process large volumes of data. Thanks to 5G, much more data can be processed with higher up- and download speeds. In addition, far more devices than now can exchange information simultaneously via the mobile internet, which supports internet-of-things applications. Another important feature is that communication between devices becomes much faster.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: This concerns the development of technologies that must process large volumes of data. Thanks to 5G, much more data can be processed with higher up- and download speeds. In addition, far more devices than now can exchange information simultaneously via the mobile internet, which supports internet-of-things applications. Another important feature is that communication between devices becomes much faster. This is known as low latency: once a signal is sent, the receiver can get it in a very short time.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Thanks to 5G, much more data can be processed with higher up- and download speeds. In addition, far more devices than now can exchange information simultaneously via the mobile internet, which supports internet-of-things applications. Another important feature is that communication between devices becomes much faster. This is known as low latency: once a signal is sent, the receiver can get it in a very short time. There is then minimal delay in the network.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: In addition, far more devices than now can exchange information simultaneously via the mobile internet, which supports internet-of-things applications. Another important feature is that communication between devices becomes much faster. This is known as low latency: once a signal is sent, the receiver can get it in a very short time. There is then minimal delay in the network. The network remains only a tool, though: real innovation comes from business.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Another important feature is that communication between devices becomes much faster. This is known as low latency: once a signal is sent, the receiver can get it in a very short time. There is then minimal delay in the network. The network remains only a tool, though: real innovation comes from business. The new applications that 5G offers unfortunately cannot yet be rolled out on a large scale in the Netherlands today.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: This is known as low latency: once a signal is sent, the receiver can get it in a very short time. There is then minimal delay in the network. The network remains only a tool, though: real innovation comes from business. The new applications that 5G offers unfortunately cannot yet be rolled out on a large scale in the Netherlands today. Frequency auctions still have to take place, standards must be finalised, and a denser network of masts must be built.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: The network remains only a tool, though: real innovation comes from business. The new applications that 5G offers unfortunately cannot yet be rolled out on a large scale in the Netherlands today. Frequency auctions still have to take place, standards must be finalised, and a denser network of masts must be built. There are also ongoing discussions on privacy and health. The current auction schedule in the Netherlands was initially delayed because one of the required frequencies (3.5 GHz) was used by Defence as a listening station.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: The new applications that 5G offers unfortunately cannot yet be rolled out on a large scale in the Netherlands today. Frequency auctions still have to take place, standards must be finalised, and a denser network of masts must be built. There are also ongoing discussions on privacy and health. The current auction schedule in the Netherlands was initially delayed because one of the required frequencies (3.5 GHz) was used by Defence as a listening station. This frequency, with more economic potential than the frequencies now being auctioned (700 MHz, 2.1 GHz and 1.4 GHz), will be auctioned in the Netherlands in 2022.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Frequency auctions still have to take place, standards must be finalised, and a denser network of masts must be built. There are also ongoing discussions on privacy and health. The current auction schedule in the Netherlands was initially delayed because one of the required frequencies (3.5 GHz) was used by Defence as a listening station. This frequency, with more economic potential than the frequencies now being auctioned (700 MHz, 2.1 GHz and 1.4 GHz), will be auctioned in the Netherlands in 2022. It is nevertheless important that companies already prepare for new possibilities so they are ready once the infrastructure is in place.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: The current auction schedule in the Netherlands was initially delayed because one of the required frequencies (3.5 GHz) was used by Defence as a listening station. text: A quick start matters for maintaining competitiveness. Foreign companies are likely exploring this as well or even further ahead, because in many other countries the auction of 5G frequencies started earlier. Opportunities for industry and logistics. The opportunities of 5G lie mainly in the ability to improve existing processes. Opportunities for industry and logistics. The opportunities of 5G lie mainly in the ability to improve existing processes. This applies, for example, to industry, where 5G is seen as an essential link for a future in which production machines and entire factories are connected online to their suppliers, logistics partners and customers. metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Opportunities for industry and logistics. The opportunities of 5G lie mainly in the ability to improve existing processes. This applies, for example, to industry, where 5G is seen as an essential link for a future in which production machines and entire factories are connected online to their suppliers, logistics partners and customers. This is also known as Smart Industry. Thanks to the 5G connection, devices and machines will soon be able to communicate with each other more easily on a continuous basis.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: The opportunities of 5G lie mainly in the ability to improve existing processes. This applies, for example, to industry, where 5G is seen as an essential link for a future in which production machines and entire factories are connected online to their suppliers, logistics partners and customers. This is also known as Smart Industry. Thanks to the 5G connection, devices and machines will soon be able to communicate with each other more easily on a continuous basis. This allows constant monitoring of how devices and machines are functioning; variations in vibrations can predict when maintenance is needed.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: This applies, for example, to industry, where 5G is seen as an essential link for a future in which production machines and entire factories are connected online to their suppliers, logistics partners and customers. This is also known as Smart Industry. Thanks to the 5G connection, devices and machines will soon be able to communicate with each other more easily on a continuous basis. This allows constant monitoring of how devices and machines are functioning; variations in vibrations can predict when maintenance is needed. These improvements mean fewer errors occur in the production process, devices and machines have shorter downtimes than now, and future machines are designed better.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: This is also known as Smart Industry. Thanks to the 5G connection, devices and machines will soon be able to communicate with each other more easily on a continuous basis. This allows constant monitoring of how devices and machines are functioning; variations in vibrations can predict when maintenance is needed. These improvements mean fewer errors occur in the production process, devices and machines have shorter downtimes than now, and future machines are designed better. Labour productivity then goes up. 5G also creates conditions for higher labour productivity in the logistics sector.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Truck platooning is still in the experimental phase, but in time 5G can enable larger-scale and broader application. Groningen already making strong progress with 5G. In Groningen, companies are already experimenting with possible applications for the logistics sector thanks to 5G. These are pilots with autonomous inland vessels and inventory management in a distribution centre using a drone that scans barcodes. Tests are also being carried out with navigation of vessels near the shore and the automatic, near real-time measurement of silt content, current and depth of waterways in Delfzijl and the Eemshaven.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Groningen already making strong progress with 5G. In Groningen, companies are already experimenting with possible applications for the logistics sector thanks to 5G. These are pilots with autonomous inland vessels and inventory management in a distribution centre using a drone that scans barcodes. Tests are also being carried out with navigation of vessels near the shore and the automatic, near real-time measurement of silt content, current and depth of waterways in Delfzijl and the Eemshaven. These innovations are part of the ‘5Groningen’ initiative, through which the Economic Board Groningen has for several years been energetically exploring the possibilities of future 5G.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: In Groningen, companies are already experimenting with possible applications for the logistics sector thanks to 5G. These are pilots with autonomous inland vessels and inventory management in a distribution centre using a drone that scans barcodes. Tests are also being carried out with navigation of vessels near the shore and the automatic, near real-time measurement of silt content, current and depth of waterways in Delfzijl and the Eemshaven. These innovations are part of the ‘5Groningen’ initiative, through which the Economic Board Groningen has for several years been energetically exploring the possibilities of future 5G. Due to existing restrictions on the 3.5 GHz frequency, this has used carrier aggregation.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: These are pilots with autonomous inland vessels and inventory management in a distribution centre using a drone that scans barcodes. Tests are also being carried out with navigation of vessels near the shore and the automatic, near real-time measurement of silt content, current and depth of waterways in Delfzijl and the Eemshaven. These innovations are part of the ‘5Groningen’ initiative, through which the Economic Board Groningen has for several years been energetically exploring the possibilities of future 5G. Due to existing restrictions on the 3.5 GHz frequency, this has used carrier aggregation. By connecting simultaneously on multiple 4G frequencies, high up- and download speeds can be achieved.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

Due to existing restrictions on the 3.5 GHz frequency, this has used carrier aggregation. By connecting simultaneously on multiple 4G frequencies, high up- and download speeds can be achieved. The initiators have linked connectivity and equipment providers to entrepreneurs from various sectors.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: The initiators have linked connectivity and equipment providers to entrepreneurs from various sectors. Opportunities for agriculture and healthcare. Other experiments within this initiative show the potential to raise productivity in agriculture. One example is a drone that takes five photos per second of farmland and crops for analysis. This immediately shows where there is a possible lack of water or fertiliser, and where disease threatens.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Opportunities for agriculture and healthcare. Other experiments within this initiative show the potential to raise productivity in agriculture. One example is a drone that takes five photos per second of farmland and crops for analysis. This immediately shows where there is a possible lack of water or fertiliser, and where disease threatens. Another agricultural example is the smart potato, a ‘digital potato’ that sends information to the farmer on, for example, the temperature, humidity and potassium levels of and in the soil.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: Other experiments within this initiative show the potential to raise productivity in agriculture. One example is a drone that takes five photos per second of farmland and crops for analysis. This immediately shows where there is a possible lack of water or fertiliser, and where disease threatens. Another agricultural example is the smart potato, a ‘digital potato’ that sends information to the farmer on, for example, the temperature, humidity and potassium levels of and in the soil. With such applications, farmers can track potato growth more easily and deploy inspection more efficiently and effectively.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: One example is a drone that takes five photos per second of farmland and crops for analysis. This immediately shows where there is a possible lack of water or fertiliser, and where disease threatens. Another agricultural example is the smart potato, a ‘digital potato’ that sends information to the farmer on, for example, the temperature, humidity and potassium levels of and in the soil. With such applications, farmers can track potato growth more easily and deploy inspection more efficiently and effectively. Groningen is also testing remote support from a medical specialist, in this case looking in on the patient during the ambulance ride.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text: This immediately shows where there is a possible lack of water or fertiliser, and where disease threatens. Another agricultural example is the smart potato, a ‘digital potato’ that sends information to the farmer on, for example, the temperature, humidity and potassium levels of and in the soil. With such applications, farmers can track potato growth more easily and deploy inspection more efficiently and effectively. Groningen is also testing remote support from a medical specialist, in this case looking in on the patient during the ambulance ride. This could save more lives, which is of course a much higher goal than raising labour productivity.

metadata.source_title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity

text:
Great potential. 5G has great potential for the business market. It is important that companies and regions already think about the applications that the new generation of mobile networks can offer. Groningen’s example deserves to be followed across the country. 5G will be an important tool to scale up technological applications that raise labour productivity. Raising productivity is the answer to staff shortages and keeps Dutch business competitive internationally. It is therefore important that business is ready in time to take this step. *This column appeared on 28 February on the platform of [Emerce](https://www.emerce.nl/achtergrond/5g-helpt-om-arbeidsproductiviteit-verhogen).*
Read more in the technology sector.
